2026-04-27.title: Virat Kohli's Milestone
2026-04-27.text: The only player to reach 9000 runs in IPL history—Virat Kohli.

2026-04-27.title: The Curse of April 27
2026-04-27.text: The most wickets in a single day fell twice in history on this exact date: RCB vs RR and Kochi Tuskers vs RR. Both happened on the same day, April 27th.

2026-04-27.title: Mr. 360's Record
2026-04-27.text: On April 27, 2021, AB de Villiers became the first player to win 25 'Player of the Match' awards in IPL history. He remains the all-time leader in this category.

2026-04-23.title: The Gayle Storm
2026-04-23.text: On April 23, 2013, Chris Gayle struck the fastest century in IPL history (30 balls) and finished with a record-breaking 175* against PWI.
